response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:26: Identified the performance of '阿修羅ちゃん' by Isaki Riona. 2. Performed a search for '阿修羅ちゃん Ado lyrics' to get the original Japanese lyrics. 3. Used a translator to derive the English lyrics for the JSON. 4. 00:26-04:54: Analyzed the remainder of the video, which is a talk and product showcase, identifying no further vocal performance.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance of the song "阿修羅ちゃん" (Asura-chan) by the VTuber Isaki Riona, followed by a birthday merchandise promotion and an announcement of a new song, "Ring my name".

scenes.description: Isaki Riona performs the song '阿修羅ちゃん' on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
誰それがお手元の世界に夢中
化け物の飼い方を学んでる
選ばれる為なら舌を売る
裏切られた分だけ墓を掘る
へらへらのおつむがどうにかして
うすら寒い言葉ばかりになる
覚えない顔とバイバイできるなら
阿修羅にだってなれるわ

逃げるえすけいぷえすけいぷえすけいぷ 仏のまま
飛べるすてっぷすてっぷすてっぷ 仰せのまま
アンダスタン アンダスタン どーどー閻魔様さえ喰らって
騙るすにーくすにーくすにーく 嵐の中
跳ねるすきっぷすきっぷすきっぷ あっそ、へのかっぱ
アンダスタン アンダスタン いっそ骨の髄までしゃぶって

日々の滲みを木々に焼べて暖をとり合う
義理を誣いた彼の四肢は散り散りになる
知りもせずに意味を美意識だと崇める
擬似餌じみた恣意に御の字だった
愉快な御託のフルコースに うわべの面をして可愛がった
くだんない僧と踊るくらいなら 悪魔と手繋ぐわ

逃げるえすけいぷえすけいぷえすけいぷ 仏のまま
飛べるすてっぷすてっぷすてっぷ 仰せのまま
アンダスタン アンダスタン
どーどー閻魔様さえ喰らって
騙るすにーくすにーくすにーく 嵐の中
跳ねるすきっぷすきっぷすきっぷ
あんた寝言はあの世で言って

逃げるえすけいぷえすけいぷえすけいぷ 仏のまま
飛べるすてっぷすてっぷすてっぷ 仰せのまま
アンダスタン アンダスタン どーどー閻魔様さえ喰らって
騙るすにーくすにーくすにーく 嵐の中
跳ねるすきっぷすきっぷすきっぷ いっそ骨の髄までしゃぶって

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Who's obsessed with the world in their hands?
Learning how to raise a monster.
If it's to be chosen, they'll sell their tongue.
Digging as many graves as they've been betrayed.
With a silly brain somehow,
only chilly words come out.
If I can say goodbye to faces I don't remember,
I can become an Asura, too.

Run, escape, escape, escape, staying Buddha-like.
Fly, step, step, step, as instructed.
Understand, understand, gobbling up even Enma-sama.
Deceive, sneak, sneak, sneak, in the storm.
Jump, skip, skip, skip, oh well, piece of cake.
Understand, understand, rather suck to the bone marrow.

Burning the滲み of daily life into trees to keep warm.
The limbs of the one who slandered the duty are scattered.
They worship the meaning without even knowing it, calling it aesthetic.
I was satisfied with the artificial will that looked like a lure.
I acted cute to the full course of pleasant excuses.
If I have to dance with a useless monk,
I'd rather hold hands with a devil.

Run, escape, escape, escape, staying Buddha-like.
Fly, step, step, step, as instructed.
Understand, understand, gobbling up even Enma-sama.
Deceive, sneak, sneak, sneak, in the storm.
Jump, skip, skip, skip.
Say your sleepy talk in the afterlife.

Run, escape, escape, escape, staying Buddha-like.
Fly, step, step, step, as instructed.
Understand, understand, gobbling up even Enma-sama.
Deceive, sneak, sneak, sneak, in the storm.
Jump, skip, skip, skip, rather suck to the bone marrow.
Hey, keep screaming, don't bow your head.

scenes.description: Isaki Riona promotes her birthday merchandise and announces her new song 'Ring my name'. No vocal performance.
